evidence: "It's a classic comedy. Brings back memories."
"If you like a good story line with creep added in then this is for you."
"It's a buddy comedy that will make you feel good and laugh at all the crazy things you could get into if you and your friends got wasted."
"This movie is not for the faint of heart. It is a great friendship comedy."
"The irony in the ending made it all worth it."
"If you like crime documentaries, or famous murderers then this is definitely worth a look."
"Carol Burnett is her wacky self as usual and john Ritter with his physical comedy really adds to the movie."
"It's a type of anthology for me. Each character tells their own story. And they all mesh together."
"It drew you in from the start with intrigue."
"If your open to a raunchier type of movie, give this one a go."
"I went into the movie thinking it was going to lack in comparison to the older six, but surprisingly enough I fell in love with it."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and horror films, often appreciating fast-paced narratives with a light-hearted tone. They show a preference for simple storytelling and are less concerned with production quality, indicating a focus on entertainment value.
